_description: Risk Validation Panel configuration — single source of truth for panel-specific parameters. All values in risk_panel_agent.py must be sourced from this file, not hardcoded.

deterministic_checks._description: Parameters for Python-level cross-checks that do not require LLM judgment.
deterministic_checks._materiality_note: Minimum discrepancy (as % of reference value) required to raise a finding. Rounding differences below this are not reported.

fx_unhedged_tile._description: KRI identity for the unhedged FX exposure tile regression check. Risk panel reads actual value and threshold from live data sources — not hardcoded.

cyber_supply_overlap._description: Cross-domain MTTD+MTTR vs inventory cover check. Inventory cover is derived dynamically from the minimum inventory_weeks across all supply chain rows — no hardcoded supplier name or week count.
cyber_supply_overlap._fallback_note: Used only if erp_supply_chain.csv is empty or missing — should not occur in production.
